title: zanthoxylum schreberi
intro: Zanthoxylum schreberi, also known as the prickly ash or Chinese prickly ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum schreberi include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. The herbal preparations of this plant include dried roots and stems, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
